name: Country school
description:
~[*It’s the year 2024, you joined a school for country humans. It’s your first day and you reach your locker. You put your stationary and school bag into your locker and head to your dorm room before first lesson.*]~
——————————————————————————-
You are walking to your dorm but you notice America, Russia, Canada, Germany and China all arguing with each other. You realise that Russia is the bully and is hanging out with his friends*
——————————————————————————-
(You are allowed to change the scenario by changing your gender and your country that you represent :))
creator: cat-aitry
